items: Fixed bare install — import "reend-components" no longer crashes without manually installing framer-motion, lucide-react, and react-resizable-panels; they are now regular dependencies
Fixed CJS build unconditionally requiring recharts — dead re-exports removed from the chart module; recharts stays an optional peer
Fixed Tailwind preset being silently ignored with plain require() — the CJS build now exports the preset object directly
Fixed CLI-copied components failing to compile without a path alias — all cn imports normalized from @/lib/utils to relative paths
React 19 types + sonner v2 compatibility — useRef without initial value fixed in CopyClipboard/ThemeSwitcher; removed pauseWhenPageIsHidden prop
Security patch — RichTextEditor: fixed XSS in markdown preview; HTML input is now escaped before rendering so raw
Security headers — added Strict-Transport-Security and a full Content-Security-Policy; 70+ new security tests covering XSS, headers, path traversal, and dependency hygiene

CLI — init now scaffolds lib/utils.ts (the cn() helper) with base dependency guidance; new `add toast` installs toast, toaster, and the use-toast hook; component sources are fetched from the matching release tag with a main fallback; registry dependency lists completed
Tailwind preset is now compiled to dist/tailwind/index.{mjs,cjs} — works from plain tailwind.config.js, not just TypeScript configs
Performance — fixed the entry bundle preloading ~1.3 MB of lazy editor/chart code; initial JavaScript is now 656 kB raw (−67%)

SEO — PNG social image (og-image.png, 1200×630), single language-aware canonical, hreflang consistent with the sitemap, localized (EN/ID) per-section meta descriptions, auto-generated sitemap.xml, and a web app manifest
Changed — recharts and react-resizable-panels are now optional peer dependencies: install them yourself if you use Chart or Resizable
Fixed — CountdownTimer stale seconds in aria-label; live-data demos abort fetches on unmount and check HTTP status; release scripts run via tsx (Node 20 compatible)

28 new UI components: OTPInput, DatePicker, Rating, FileUpload, RichTextEditor, BackToTop, BottomSheet, Carousel, CommandPalette, ContextMenu, CookieConsent, CopyClipboard, Dropdown, FilterBar, Footer, Resizable, ScrollProgress, SessionTimeoutModal, ViewToggle, Chart, List, SortControl, SpoilerBlock, Stat, Table, ThemeSwitcher, PullToRefresh, SwipeableItem
4 new hooks: useFocusTrap, useShortcut, useInView, useStagger — all exported from the library

17 enhanced components: Accordion (rotating + indicator), Alert (dismissible, ARIA), Avatar (diamond glow hover, per-size scaling), Dialog (5 sizes, animate-dialog-in), Popover (z-index fix), Skeleton (4 variants), Sonner (design token colors), Stepper (overflow fix), Switch (diamond thumb + spin), Tabs (flex-wrap), and more
7 signature component updates: CommandOutput, FrequencyBars, MatrixGrid, MissionCard, OperatorCard, StatusBar, TacticalTable
Design token overhaul: semantic --text-* tokens, --ef-yellow-glow, font variable references, light mode overrides for all new tokens
New utilities.css bundled into dist/lib/style.css: 11 animation keyframes, clip-corner, panel-glass, scanline-overlay, spoiler utilities
CLI registry updated: date-picker @radix-ui/react-popover dep fixed, holo-card false framer-motion dep removed
Docs site: all 11 sections fully rewritten with code props on every ComponentPreview, ARIA compliance, token-only colors
EN + ID translations for all 28 new components and 4 hooks (24 locale files updated)
CLI usage documented in Installation section — all 4 commands (init/add/list/update) in EN + ID
Test suite restructured: 1166 tests across 26 files — 4 signature subtests, 4 section integration tests
Build: Vite chunk splitting for sandpack/codemirror/lezer/radix/charts/icons/i18n — 0 chunk size warnings
Bundle: 230.92 kB MJS (49.69 kB gzip)
Accessibility audit — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance pass across all 47 components
Stepper: added role="list", aria-label per step with state (completed/current/upcoming), aria-current="step" on active step
Timeline: added role="list" on container, role="listitem" + aria-current on TimelineItem
TacticalTable: selectable rows now keyboard accessible — tabIndex=0, Enter/Space triggers onRowClick, focus-visible ring
Alert: decorative icon span (◆/✓/⚠/✕) now has aria-hidden="true"
MissionCard: progress bar now has role="progressbar" with aria-valuenow/min/max
Breadcrumb: separator li now has role="presentation" in addition to aria-hidden
API: exported missing TypeScript types from barrel — StepItem, StepperProps, TimelineProps, TimelineItemProps, PaginationProps, BreadcrumbItemData, BreadcrumbProps, NumberInputProps
Light mode audit — replaced all hardcoded border-white/x and bg-white/x classes with adaptive semantic tokens (border-input, border-border, border-border-strong, bg-surface-*) across 18 components
Tailwind preset: added border-strong sub-token (hsl(var(--border-strong))) enabling border-border-strong utility
Form fields (Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Switch, NumberInput) now have visible borders in light mode via border-input token
Button secondary/icon, Badge default, Accordion, Tabs, Dialog, Popover, Separator, Skeleton, Pagination, Timeline, Stepper, Breadcrumb, EmptyState all use adaptive border/bg tokens

9 new Signature components — MissionCard, OperatorCard, StatusBar, CommandOutput, CountdownTimer, MatrixGrid, FrequencyBars, TacticalTable (+ DataStream, HUDOverlay, GlitchText, RadarChart enhancements)
5 new Core gap utility components — Timeline, Stepper, Pagination, Breadcrumb, NumberInput
3 gap components added to public exports — Skeleton, EmptyState, Alert
CLI Tool: `npx reend-ui` — init, add, list, update commands (shadcn-style copy-paste workflow for 42 components)
Component Playground: Sandpack-powered live code editor embedded in docs — share URL via btoa, reset, per-component 'Open in Playground' button
45 new tests (675 total across 14 test files) — Timeline, Stepper, Pagination, Breadcrumb, NumberInput coverage
CLI binary built via esbuild to dist/bin/cli.cjs — standalone Node 18+, no install required
15 new production-ready components — Button, Badge, Card, Input, Textarea, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Switch, Select, Avatar, Progress, Accordion, Tabs, Popover, Dialog, Separator
Button: 6 variants (primary, secondary, ghost, danger, link, icon), 5 sizes, loading state with diamond spinner, asChild via Radix Slot
Badge: 7 color variants (primary, info, success, warning, danger, purple, default), removable with onRemove callback
Card: corner bracket decoration on 2 corners, hoverable + selected boolean variants — with CardHeader, CardMeta, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardBody, CardFooter
Input: wrapper-div architecture, 3 states (default/error/success), 3 sizes, leftElement + rightElement slots
Textarea: showCount character counter (muted → orange ≥80% → red >maxLength), resize-y, all Input states
Checkbox: square 18×18px border-2, ◆ checked indicator, − indeterminate — via group-data-[state] Tailwind
RadioGroup: ◇ (unchecked) → ◆ (checked) diamond swap pattern, label + helperText props
Switch: square track (rounded-none), label / offLabel / onLabel props, translate-x-5 thumb on checked
Select: 10 sub-components (Trigger, Content, Item, Label, Separator, ScrollUp/Down, Group, Value), danger item variant
Avatar: clip-corner-sm shape (NOT circle), 6 sizes (xs → 2xl), ◆ status dot with 4 states (online/offline/busy/away)
Progress: 4 color variants (default/success/danger/info), 3 sizes, showLabel, indeterminate shimmer animation
Accordion: +/− font-mono indicator (not chevron), smooth expand/collapse via --radix-accordion-content-height
Tabs: 3 variants — underline (active border-b), pill (bg-surface-3), bordered (bg-white/5) — CVA on list + trigger
Popover: surface-2 panel, shadow-lg, fade-in-up animation, min-w-[200px], sideOffset=6
Dialog: 5 size variants (sm/md/lg/xl/fullscreen), backdrop-blur-sm overlay — full anatomy (Trigger, Overlay, Content, Header, Footer, Title, Description, Close)
Separator: 5 style variants (default/subtle/strong/glow/accent), horizontal + vertical orientation
400 tests passing across 11 test files — >70% statement coverage on all new components
Bundle: 62.00 kB MJS (gzip: 13.34 kB) — under 70 kB Month 3 target
Docs site demos updated to use real library components (Accordion, Tabs, Dialog, Popover, Separator)
11 Signature Components exported from npm library: GlitchText, DiamondLoader, TacticalPanel, HoloCard, DataStream, TacticalBadge, WarningBanner, ScanDivider, CoordinateTag, RadarChart, HUDOverlay
Dependency cleanup — 7 docs-only packages (i18next, shiki, react-router-dom, etc.) moved to devDependencies
framer-motion and lucide-react added as optional peer dependencies
89 tests passing across 4 test files — 86.69% statement coverage
GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline — lint, typecheck, test, build on every push
README updated with value proposition, Signature Components API table, and peer deps guide
Bundle: 28.15 kB MJS (gzip: 7.11 kB)
Initial npm library release — Tooltip, Toast, Toaster, SonnerToaster, cn(), useToast()
CSS design token system with ef-* color palette and surface-* layering
Tailwind CSS preset exported as reend-components/tailwind
Documentation site launch with Sci-Fi Industrial Futurism theme
87+ component previews across 11 thematic sections
Shiki syntax highlighting, interactive playgrounds, fuzzy search (⌘K)
English and Indonesian (Bahasa) i18n — 16 namespaces
